title: Barbell Stage-2 re-design: PCE lottery venue eliminated by official 3-round Jun 21-24 structure
source: Official competition overview 2026-06-15 (FAQ + phase table); supersedes Discord-derived timeline in B0158
why: The CEO-adopted barbell (project-barbell-decision, docs/submission/barbell-strategy.md) placed its deliberate-variance numerator bet in Stage 2 = 'Jun 25->26, buy variance at US PCE Thu Jun25 13:30 via the isolated lottery sleeve B0150'. The authoritative Jun-15 overview eliminates that venue: live trading is Jun 21->24 ONLY, three daily equity-ranked elimination rounds (Top200/150/100), and NO trading Jun 25-26. The lottery sleeve (B0150) remains a valid production-ready TOOL, but its scheduled trigger (PCE on a day with no market access) is moot. Ranking is now confirmed ACCOUNT EQUITY at each round end (not Sharpe), which strengthens the case for bounded variance to clear each daily cut, but it must live INSIDE Jun 21-24.
value_rationale: Stage 2 is half of the adopted strategy and its venue no longer exists; without a re-design the frozen launch command would arm a sleeve that never fires. Equity-per-round ranking makes the re-design materially affect advancement.
scope: CEO RE-DECISION (reserved): does the deliberate-variance leg move INSIDE Jun 21-24, and if so where - e.g. a Round-3 push (Jun23 22:00->Jun24 22:00) for a book near the Top-100 equity boundary, armed conditionally on rank?
Re-map the lottery sleeve trigger from the dead PCE-25 schedule to an in-window catalyst or rank-conditional arming inside Jun 21-24; parse the in-window economic calendar for high-vol events.

Resolve the BETWEEN-ROUNDS modification question (B0158): if overnight re-tuning is legal, Stage 2 can be a Round-3-only arming decided live after R1/R2; if strict-freeze, pre-arm rank-conditionally in the launch command.
Update docs/submission/barbell-strategy.md + operations-runbook §6 to the 3-round equity-ranked structure (three sequential daily marks, not one Jun-24 cut + Jun-26 liquidation).
Confirm the lottery sleeve latch/envelope composes correctly when fired inside the survival-book window rather than an isolated post-cut blind period.
recommendation: RESERVED to CEO - do not pre-empt. Surface the invalidation and option space; the variance leg either (a) moves to a rank-conditional Round-3 arming inside Jun 21-24, or (b) is dropped for survival-only across all three equity cuts. Gate on the between-rounds-modification answer.
out_of_scope: Re-building lottery sleeve mechanics (B0150 done); proposing a brand-new strategy.

history.reason: Spawned from B0158 on the authoritative Jun-15 overview: barbell Stage-2 PCE venue (Jun 25-26) eliminated; trading is Jun 21-24 only, three equity-ranked rounds.

Premise falsified by CEO reconciliation 2026-06-15: the public overview's literal 'Phase 2 = Jun 21-24' does NOT mean trading ends Jun 24. The Top 100 keep trading Jun 24 22:00 -> Jun 26 22:00 BST (narrowing to Top 25); the US-PCE (Jun 25) variance venue is intact, so barbell Stage 2 stands as designed. No Stage-2 re-design needed. Residual open question (finalist-round / final-rank metric) folded back into B0158.
